case_title: KELSON, GEORGE vs. WOPSHAM, BRUCE et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE PRO TEMP, RONALD M. ARLAS, MARILYN NORMAN, REPORTER, JGOMEZ-WONG/JTOM, CLERK, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED. ON THE RECORD, JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION AGAINST ALL TENANTS, WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMED. STAY UNTIL 10/1/96, ALL BACK RENT WAIVED. IF DEFT FAIL TO VACATE ON 10/1/96 JUDGMENT WILL INCLUDES RENT AND DAMAGES FOR $2070.00

DEMAND FOR JURY ON MEMO SETTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELSON, GEORGE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-18-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-25-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELSON, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT WOPSHAM, BRUCE ALPERS, DOUG DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WOPSHAM, BRUCE

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELSON, GEORGE SERVED AUG-28-1996, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT WOPSHAM, BRUCE ALPERS, DOUG DOES 1 TO 10

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOPSHAM, BRUCE ALPERS, DOUG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 165 GERMANIA STREET (UPPER), ALSO KNOWN AS 165 GERMAINIA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-01-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, PURS TO PRE-JUDGMNT CLAIM, JUDGMENT INCLUDES ALL UNNAMED DEFTS. STAY OF EVICTION UNTIL 5PM ON 10-1-96. IF DEFTS FAIL TO VACATE TIMELY, PLTF SHALL HAVE RIGHT TO SEEK AMD JUDGMNT FOR BACK RENT OF $2070.00 (RENT FROM 7-15-96 THRU 10-1-96) SEE STIPULATION FOR OTHER DETAILS.
